name: speak-with-my-voice
description: Generate speech in the operator's cloned voice using mlx-audio Qwen3-TTS ICL. The voice profile must already be registered via clone-my-voice.json. Required context vars: text, profile_id. Optional: output_path, delivery_mode (playback|artifact|artifact_and_playback), language.
_migration_note: v2: Typed Flow format (role/produces/consumes). v1 used type without roles.

context.text: こんにちは。これはKyberionのボイスクローニング機能のテストです。
